title: Visible Invisibility Particles
description: A texture pack that turns potion particles very bright and noticeable. Helps you spot invisible players with ease.
body:
# Visible Invisibility Particles
Visible Invisibility Particles replaces potion particle effects with bright red Among Us characters, making them highly visible.
## Features
- Replaces potion particles with bright red custom icons
- Makes invisibility effects easy to spot
- Helps detect invisible players instantly
- Useful for PvP and competitive gameplay
## **Why use this pack?**
Invisibility particles are often difficult to notice during combat. By using highly visible particle textures, this pack makes invisible players much easier to detect and track.
